entry.title: New IDC N0018918DQ001 awarded to DLT SOLUTIONS, LLC for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY ORACLE ENTERPRISE SOFTWARE LICENSE AGREEMENT IDIQ CONTRACT FOR ORACLE SOFTWARE PROGRAMS AND ASSOCIATED TECHNICAL SUPPORT.

ns1:claimantProgramCode.description: ALL OTHERS NOT IDENTIFIABLE TO ANY OTHER PROCUREMENT PROGRAM

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:extentCompeted.description: FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION AFTER EXCLUSION OF SOURCES

ns1:subcontractPlan.description: PLAN NOT INCLUDED - NO SUBCONTRACTING POSSIBILITIES
